variations.compliment: Alicesec looks like a smart service - making it receive-only and prohibiting outbound sending to the internet seems like a clever way to sidestep a lot of the usual abuse problems.
variations.email:
Hello Alice,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Alicesec looks like a smart service - making it receive-only and prohibiting outbound sending to the internet seems like a clever way to sidestep a lot of the usual abuse problems.

Happy to answer any questions you might have about Polymer.

Cheers,
Jessica
